title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 347.173 - Derivative action — complaint
text:
347.173.  Derivative action — complaint. — In a derivative action, the complaint shall set forth with particularity the effort of the plaintiff to secure initiation of the action by the persons who would otherwise have the authority to cause the limited liability company to sue in its own right.
(L. 1993 S.B. 66 & 20 § 359.818) 
Effective 12-01-93
